vocab.meaning: có vẻ ngoài phù hợp với hoàn cảnh/vị trí
vocab.example: If you want to be taken seriously in a corporate environment, wearing a classic watch helps you look the part.

vocab.word: keep your feet on the ground
vocab.meaning: giữ thái độ thực tế, không bị phân tâm bởi những thứ phù phiếm
vocab.example: In a world of constant digital notifications, looking at an analog watch helps me keep my feet on the ground and stay present.

vocab.meaning: phần bổ sung làm cho mọi thứ trở nên hoàn hảo hơn
vocab.example: A well-tailored suit is great, but a sophisticated watch is really the icing on the cake for a professional outfit.

vocab.word: get into the swing of things
vocab.meaning: bắt đầu quen với và thực hiện công việc một cách trôi chảy
vocab.example: Putting on my watch every morning is a ritual that helps me get into the swing of things and prepare for a productive day.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra lợi thế cho ai đó
vocab.example: Being able to check the time discreetly during a long meeting can give you an edge in managing your agenda.

vocab.meaning: giữ bình tĩnh và tỉnh táo
vocab.example: When a deadline is approaching, glancing at my wrist helps me keep a level head and prioritize my remaining tasks.

vocab.meaning: dẫn dắt hoặc thiết lập tốc độ làm việc
vocab.example: A watch allows me to set the pace of my study sessions without being interrupted by phone messages.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực nhiều hơn mức bình thường
vocab.example: People who wear watches often seem like the type who would go the extra mile to ensure punctuality and precision.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: Managing your own time effectively is part and parcel of being a successful adult, and a watch is the best tool for that.

vocab.meaning: luôn cảnh giác và sẵn sàng phản ứng
vocab.example: Wearing a watch helps you keep your wits about you when traveling, as you don't need to constantly pull out an expensive phone.
